name: mine-app
description: MINE — native mobile app wrapper. Wraps the MINE web dashboards in a native iOS + Android shell with full native bridges: camera, push notifications, Stripe Terminal Tap to Pay, QR scanning, file system, deep linking, share sheet.

scripts.init: npm install && npx cap add ios && npx cap add android
scripts.build: echo 'Web build = MINE dashboards are loaded from the deployed backend; no build step needed' && npx cap sync
